revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{cfd all|renaming to {{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{cat|{{{target}}}}}|some other name}}|cfr|Rename|rename|renaming| section={{{1|}}}|day={{{day}}}|month={{{month}}}|year={{{year}}}|target={{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{target}}}}}|UNKNOWN}}|startmonth={{{startmonth|}}}|startyear={{{startyear|}}}|admin-override=[{{FULLURL:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{URLENCODE:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpReason={{URLENCODE:[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}]]}}&wpNewTitle={{URLENCODE:{{cat|{{{target|}}}}}}}}} Click here to rename]}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

{{cfd all|renaming to {{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{cat|{{{target}}}}}|some other name}}|cfr|Rename|rename|renaming| section={{{1|}}}|day={{{day}}}|month={{{month}}}|year={{{year}}}|target={{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{target}}}}}|UNKNOWN}}|startmonth={{{startmonth|}}}|startyear={{{startyear|}}}|admin-override=[{{FULLURL:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{URLENCODE:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpReason={{URLENCODE:[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}]]}}&wpNewTitle={{URLENCODE:{{cat|{{{target|}}}}}}}}} Click here to rename]}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! -->

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{cfd all|renaming to {{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{cat|{{{target}}}}}|some other name}}|cfr|Rename|rename|renaming| section={{{1|}}}|day={{{day}}}|month={{{month}}}|year={{{year}}}|target={{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{target}}}}}|UNKNOWN}}|startmonth={{{startmonth|}}}|startyear={{{startyear|}}}|admin-override=[{{FULLURL:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{URLENCODE:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpReason={{URLENCODE:[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}]]}}&wpNewTitle={{URLENCODE:{{cat|{{{target|}}}}}}}}} Click here to rename]}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! -->

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{cfd all|renaming to {{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{cat|{{{target}}}}}|some other name}}|cfr|Rename|rename|renaming| section={{{1|}}}|day={{{day}}}|month={{{month}}}|year={{{year}}}|target={{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{target}}}}}|UNKNOWN}}|startmonth={{{startmonth|}}}|startyear={{{startyear|}}}|admin-override=[{{FULLURL:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{URLENCODE:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpReason={{URLENCODE:[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}]]}}&wpNewTitle={{URLENCODE:{{cat|{{{target|}}}}}}}}} Click here to rename]}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! -->

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

{{cfd all|renaming to {{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{cat|{{{target}}}}}|some other name}}|cfr|Rename|rename|renaming| section={{{1|}}}|day={{{day}}}|month={{{month}}}|year={{{year}}}|target={{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{target}}}}}|UNKNOWN}}|startmonth={{{startmonth|}}}|startyear={{{startyear|}}}|admin-override=[{{FULLURL:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{URLENCODE:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpReason={{URLENCODE:[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}]]}}&wpNewTitle={{URLENCODE:{{cat|{{{target|}}}}}}}}} Click here to rename]}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! -->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cfr_full here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cfr_full for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{cfd all|renaming to {{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{cat|{{{target}}}}}|some other name}}|cfr|Rename|rename|renaming| section={{{1|}}}|day={{{day}}}|month={{{month}}}|year={{{year}}}|target={{#if:{{{target|}}}|{{PAGENAME:{{{target}}}}}|UNKNOWN}}|startmonth={{{startmonth|}}}|startyear={{{startyear|}}}|admin-override=[{{FULLURL:Special:MovePage|wpOldTitle={{URLENCODE:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}&wpReason={{URLENCODE:[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/{{{year}}} {{{month}}} {{{day}}}#{{#if:{{{section|}}}|{{{section}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}]]}}&wpNewTitle={{URLENCODE:{{cat|{{{target|}}}}}}}}} Click here to rename]}} <noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
